global_community.description: Join over 1 million active participants in 200+ countries worldwide.

international_reach.description: Competitions organized by continent, region and country for a global experience.

guaranteed_security.title: Guaranteed Security
guaranteed_security.description: Identity verification and automatic moderation for a safe environment.

innovative_voting.description: Vote with our unique MyHigh5 system (5-4-3-2-1 points) by drag & drop.

testimonials.title: What Our Community Says
testimonials.subtitle: Discover the experiences of our members from around the world.

sarah_m.name: Sarah M.
sarah_m.text: MyHigh5 changed my life! I won 3 beauty contests and earned over $5,000 through the affiliate program.

carlos_r.name: Carlos R.
carlos_r.text: The voting system is revolutionary. Fair, transparent and really fun to use!

emma_l.name: Emma L.
emma_l.text: Amazing global community. I made friends from all continents and discovered incredible talents.

footer.description: Join the world's largest contest community. Compete, vote and earn through our revolutionary 10-level affiliate program.

groups.title: Groups
groups.select_chat: Select a group to open the conversation.
groups.join_to_chat: Join this group to read and send messages.
groups.members_private_hint: Member list is available after you join this group.
groups.invite_code_hint: Enter the invite code you received from a member.
groups.private_visibility_help: Private groups are hidden from people who are not members. Anyone an admin adds by username becomes a member and will see this group.
groups.public_visibility_help: Public groups appear for everyone and can be joined without an invite code.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Financial overview, journal entries, and reports
accounting.journal_desc_paged: Posted entries, newest first. Use Load more for older history.
accounting.no_coa: No accounts in the database. Run chart-of-accounts initialization on the server.
accounting.reports_hint: Generate balance sheet, income statement, trial balance, USDT (BSC) treasury summary, or account activity.
accounting.full_pack_hint: Full pack runs consistency checks and includes balance sheet, income statement, trial balance, USDT (BSC) treasury summary, and ledger summaries.
accounting.operations_desc: Check ledger integrity, sync the chart of accounts from the server, backfill missing payment journals, and correct founding-member accruals. Existing journals keep the same account IDs when codes are renamed.
accounting.founding_pool_backfill_hint: Use when deposits already have journals but account 2104 is missing. Run a dry run first.
